item.name: Authentication

query.description: Required if number is not provided

request.description: Request an OTP via email or phone number. You can provide either email or number.

query.description: Required if email is not provided

request.description: Request an OTP via phone number. This uses Twilio to send SMS.

exec: console.log("Auth ID saved to environment variables");

query.description: Required if number is not provided
The OTP received via email or SMS

request.description: Verify the OTP sent to email. On successful verification, it returns an auth_id that can be used for registration.

exec: console.log("Auth ID saved to environment variables");

query.description: Required if email is not provided
The OTP received via email or SMS

request.description: Verify the OTP sent to mobile number. On successful verification, it returns an auth_id that can be used for registration.
Register a new user using the new registration flow. This creates a user account and sends verification emails with OTP.
Login with existing user credentials
Get current user data

query.description: Email address to send reset password link

request.description: Request a password reset link via email

item.description: Authentication endpoints including registration, login, OTP verification, and password reset

item.name: Company

body.raw:
{
    "company_legal_name": "Example Corp",
    "manager_name": "John Manager",
    "type_of_company": "Real Estate",
    "email_address": "company@example.com",
    "bank_branch": "Main Branch",
    "bank_address": "456 Bank St, City",
    "country": "United States",
    "bank_account_number": "123456789",
    "iban": "US123456789",
    "swift_code": "SWIFT123"
}

request.description: Create new company with bank details
Get company by ID

body.raw:
{
    "company_legal_name": "Updated Corp",
    "manager_name": "Updated Manager",
    "type_of_company": "Updated Real Estate",
    "email_address": "updated@example.com",
    "bank_branch": "Updated Branch",
    "bank_address": "Updated Address",
    "country": "Canada",
    "bank_account_number": "987654321",
    "iban": "CA987654321",
    "swift_code": "SWIFT987"
}

request.description: Update company by ID including bank details
Delete company by ID

item.description: Company management endpoints (now including bank details)

item.name: Properties

formdata.value: Beautiful luxury apartment with amazing views

formdata.description: 1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking
1: Available Days, 2: Busy Days (Required when property_classification is 4)
JSON array of date ranges (Required when property_classification is 4)

request.description: Create a new property listing with all required fields including the new policy_data (required), weekend_commission (optional), and identity_proof (optional)

formdata.description: 1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking
1: Available Days, 2: Busy Days (Required when property_classification is 4)
JSON array of date ranges (Required when property_classification is 4)

request.description: Update an existing property with all fields including the new policy_data, weekend_commission, and identity_proof fields
Get property details by ID
Delete a property by ID

formdata.value: Beautiful beachfront vacation villa with private pool

request.description: Create a new vacation home property listing with availability_type and available_dates fields

formdata.value: Updated description for beachfront vacation villa

request.description: Update an existing vacation home property with availability_type and available_dates fields

formdata.value: Luxury hotel with amazing amenities and views

formdata.description: Base price (individual room prices are defined in hotel_rooms)
Price per night for this room

formdata.value: Standard room with one queen bed

formdata.description: Price per night for this room

formdata.value: Deluxe room with king bed and ocean view

request.description: Create a new hotel property listing with multiple room types and rooms. For hotel properties, policy_data and weekend_commission are not required.

formdata.value: Updated luxury hotel with premium amenities

formdata.description: ID of existing room (required for updating)
ID of the room type (new room)

formdata.value: Presidential suite with multiple rooms and balcony

request.description: Update an existing hotel property with room modifications and additions. For hotel properties, policy_data and weekend_commission are not required.

item.description: Property management endpoints including the new fields: policy_data (required document except for hotel properties), weekend_commission (optional percentage except for hotel properties), identity_proof (optional image), vacation home fields (availability_type and available_dates), and hotel booking fields (refund_policy, hotel_rooms)

request.description: Get system settings
